'''âb-l-t''' ('''kabalat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:riddle|riddle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:riddle|riddle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-l-t
|-
! Lemma
| kabalat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibalat|thibalat]] || [[word:jibalat|jibalat]] || [[word:shibalat|shibalat]] || [[word:kibalat|kibalat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubalat|thuthubalat]] || [[word:jujubalat|jujubalat]] || [[word:shushubalat|shushubalat]] || [[word:kukubalat|kukubalat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubalat|thubalat]] || [[word:jubalat|jubalat]] || [[word:shubalat|shubalat]] || [[word:kubalat|kubalat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubalat|thubalat]] || [[word:jubalat|jubalat]] || [[word:shubalat|shubalat]] || [[word:kubalat|kubalat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebalat|thebalat]] || [[word:jebalat|jebalat]] || [[word:shebalat|shebalat]] || [[word:kebalat|kebalat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobalat|thothobalat]] || [[word:jojobalat|jojobalat]] || [[word:shoshobalat|shoshobalat]] || [[word:kokobalat|kokobalat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobalat|thobalat]] || [[word:jobalat|jobalat]] || [[word:shobalat|shobalat]] || [[word:kobalat|kobalat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobalat|thobalat]] || [[word:jobalat|jobalat]] || [[word:shobalat|shobalat]] || [[word:kobalat|kobalat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbalat|thĂŠbalat]] || [[word:jĂŠbalat|jĂŠbalat]] || [[word:shĂŠbalat|shĂŠbalat]] || [[word:kĂŠbalat|kĂŠbalat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabalat|thathabalat]] || [[word:jajabalat|jajabalat]] || [[word:shashabalat|shashabalat]] || [[word:kakabalat|kakabalat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabalat|thabalat]] || [[word:jabalat|jabalat]] || [[word:shabalat|shabalat]] || [[word:kabalat|kabalat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabalat|thabalat]] || [[word:jabalat|jabalat]] || [[word:shabalat|shabalat]] || [[word:kabalat|kabalat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabalat|shabalat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabalat|goshabalat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabalat|gokishabalat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabalatnĂŒ|shabalatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabalatnknĂŒ|goshabalatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalatnĂŒ|gokishabalatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabalatshĂ«|shabalatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabalatnkshĂ«|goshabalatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabalatshĂ«|gokishabalatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalatro|shabalatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalatnkro|goshabalatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalatro|gokishabalatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalatmu|shabalatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalatnkmu|goshabalatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalatmu|gokishabalatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabalatsher|shabalatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabalatnksher|goshabalatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabalatsher|gokishabalatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabalatng|shabalatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabalatnkng|goshabalatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabalatng|gokishabalatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabalatya|shabalatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabalatnkya|goshabalatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabalatya|gokishabalatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabalatyam|shabalatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabalatnkyam|goshabalatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabalatyam|gokishabalatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabalatnĂŒshĂ«|shabalatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabalatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshabalatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabalatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishabalatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalatnĂŒro|shabalatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalatnknĂŒro|goshabalatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalatnĂŒro|gokishabalatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalatnĂŒmu|shabalatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalatnknĂŒmu|goshabalatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalatnĂŒmu|gokishabalatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabalatshĂ«nĂŒ|shabalatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabalatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshabalatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishabalatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalatshĂ«ro|shabalatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalatnkshĂ«ro|goshabalatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalatshĂ«ro|gokishabalatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalatshĂ«mu|shabalatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalatnkshĂ«mu|goshabalatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalatshĂ«mu|gokishabalatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabalatronĂŒ|shabalatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabalatnkronĂŒ|goshabalatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalatronĂŒ|gokishabalatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabalatroshĂ«|shabalatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabalatnkroshĂ«|goshabalatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabalatroshĂ«|gokishabalatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalatromu|shabalatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalatnkromu|goshabalatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalatromu|gokishabalatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabalatmunĂŒ|shabalatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabalatnkmunĂŒ|goshabalatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalatmunĂŒ|gokishabalatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabalatmushĂ«|shabalatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabalatnkmushĂ«|goshabalatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabalatmushĂ«|gokishabalatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalatmuro|shabalatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalatnkmuro|goshabalatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalatmuro|gokishabalatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
